description: Implement a database-level audit log for patient address changes in the MedinTux database (DrTuxTest). The implementation must include a table named 'address_audit_log' with columns log_id (INT PK AI), patient_guid (VARCHAR), old_address (TEXT), new_address (TEXT), and change_date (DATETIME/TIMESTAMP). A MySQL TRIGGER named 'trg_audit_address_update' must be created on the 'fchpat' table to detect updates to the 'FchPat_Adresse' column and record them in the audit log. Save the SQL implementation commands to '~/audit_implementation.sql'. You have root access to MySQL (no password).
